description: Order of payment (حوالة) in Arabic script. The "judge" (al-dayyān) is asked to pay 5 dinars to the bearer. On verso, in Judaeo-Arabic, the name "Abū Kathīr." Belongs with T-S AS 146.19, T-S AS 151.132, T-S AS 177.36, T-S AS 177.103, T-S AS 177.198, T-S AS 179.204, T-S AS 180.131, T-S AS 181.157, T-S AS 182.297, T-S AS 183.11, JRL Gaster ar. 238, and probably many more.
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
